content.original: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
content.transliteration: ik-oNkaar sat naam kartaa purakh nirbha-o nirvair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhaN gur prasaad.
content.text: One Universal Creator God. The Name is Truth. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image of the Timeless One. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace.

content.original: ਜਪੁ ॥ ਆਦਿ ਸਚੁ ਜੁਗਾਦਿ ਸਚੁ ॥ ਹੈ ਭੀ ਸਚੁ ਨਾਨਕ ਹੋਸੀ ਭੀ ਸਚੁ ॥੧॥
content.transliteration: Jap. Aad sach jugaad sach. Hai bhee sach naanak hosee bhee sach. ||1||
content.text: Meditate. True in the beginning, True through all the ages. True here and now, O Nanak, True forevermore. ||1||

content.original: ਸੋਚੈ ਸੋਚਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜੇ ਸੋਚੀ ਲਖ ਵਾਰ ॥
content.transliteration: sochai soch na hova-ee je sochee lakh vaar.
content.text: By thinking, He cannot be reduced to thought, even by thinking hundreds of thousands of times.

content.original: ਚੁਪੈ ਚੁਪ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਜੇ ਲਾਇ ਰਹਾ ਲਿਵ ਤਾਰ ॥
content.transliteration: chupai chup na hova-ee je laa-ay rahaa liv taar.
content.text: By remaining silent, inner silence is not obtained, even by remaining lovingly absorbed deep within.

content.original: ਭੁਖਿਆ ਭੁਖ ਨ ਉਤਰੀ ਜੇ ਬੰਨਾ ਪੁਰੀਆ ਭਾਰ ॥
content.transliteration: bhukhi-aa bhukh na utree je bannaa puree-aa bhaar.
content.text: The hunger of the hungry is not appeased, even by piling up loads of worldly goods.

content.original: ਸਹਸ ਸਿਆਣਪਾ ਲਖ ਹੋਹਿ ਤ ਇਕ ਨ ਚਲੈ ਨਾਲਿ ॥
content.transliteration: sahas si-aanpaa lakh hohi ta ik na chalai naal.
content.text: Hundreds of thousands of clever tricks, but not even one of them will go along with you in the end.

content.original: ਕਿਵ ਸਚਿਆਰਾ ਹੋਈਐ ਕਿਵ ਕੂੜੈ ਤੁਟੈ ਪਾਲਿ ॥
content.transliteration: kiv sachi-aaraa ho-ee-ai kiv koorhai tutai paal.
content.text: So how can you become truthful? And how can the veil of illusion be torn away?

content.original: ਹੁਕਮਿ ਰਜਾਈ ਚਲਣਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਲਿਖਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ॥੨॥
content.transliteration: hukam rajaa-ee chalnaa naanak likhi-aa naal. ||2||
content.text: O Nanak, it is written that you shall obey the Hukam (Command) of His Will. ||2||

content.original: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੋਵਨਿ ਆਕਾਰ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਕਹਿਆ ਜਾਈ ॥
content.transliteration: hukmee hovan aakaar hukam na kahi-aa jaa-ee.
content.text: By His Command, bodies are created. His Command cannot be described.

content.original: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਹੋਵਨਿ ਜੀਅ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਮਿਲੈ ਵਡਿਆਈ ॥
content.transliteration: hukmee hovan jee-a hukam milai vadi-aa-ee.
content.text: By His Command, souls come into being. By His Command, glory and greatness are obtained.

content.original: ਹੁਕਮੀ ਉਤਮੁ ਨੀਚੁ ਹੁਕਮਿ ਲਿਖਿ ਦੁਖ ਸੁਖ ਪਾਈਅਹਿ ॥
content.transliteration: hukmee utam neech hukam likh dukh sukh paa-ee-ah.
content.text: By His Command, some are high and some are low. By His written Command, pain and pleasure are obtained.

content.original: ਸਾਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਾਚੁ ਨਾਇ ਭਾਖਿਆ ਭਾਉ ਅਪਾਰੁ ॥
content.transliteration: saachaa saahib saach naa-ay bhaakhi-aa bhaa-o apaar.
content.text: True is the Master, True is His Name — speak it with infinite love.

content.original: ਥਾਪਿਆ ਨ ਜਾਇ ਕੀਤਾ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥ ਆਪੇ ਆਪਿ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਸੋਇ ॥
content.transliteration: thaapi-aa na jaa-ay keetaa na ho-ay. aapay aap niranjan so-ay.
content.text: He cannot be established. He cannot be created. The Immaculate Lord is self-existent.

content.original: ਤੀਰਥਿ ਨਾਵਾ ਜੇ ਤਿਸੁ ਭਾਵਾ ਵਿਣੁ ਭਾਣੇ ਕਿ ਨਾਇ ਕਰੀ ॥
content.transliteration: teerath naavaa je tis bhaavaa vin bhaanay ki naa-ay karee.
content.text: If it pleases Him, I will bathe at the sacred pilgrimage site. Without His pleasure, what is the use of bathing?

content.original: ਜੇ ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਆਰਜਾ ਹੋਰ ਦਸੂਣੀ ਹੋਇ ॥
content.transliteration: jay jug chaaray aarjaa hor dasoonee ho-ay.
content.text: If you lived throughout the four ages, or even ten times more...

content.original: ਸੁਣਿਐ ਈਸਰੁ ਬਰਮਾ ਇੰਦੁ ॥ ਸੁਣਿਐ ਮੁਖਿ ਸਾਲਾਹਣੁ ਮੰਦੁ ॥
content.transliteration: suni-ai eesar barmaa ind. suni-ai mukh saalaahan mand.
content.text: By listening — Shiva, Brahma and Indra. By listening — even foul-mouthed people praise Him.

content.original: ਮੰਨੇ ਕੀ ਗਤਿ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥ ਜੇ ਕੋ ਕਹੈ ਪਿਛੈ ਪਛੁਤਾਇ ॥
content.transliteration: manay kee gat kahee na jaa-ay. jay ko kahai pichai pachutaa-ay.
content.text: The state of the believer cannot be described. One who tries to describe this shall regret the attempt.

content.original: ਸੋ ਦਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਸੋ ਘਰੁ ਕੇਹਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਬਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਸਮਾਲੇ ॥
content.transliteration: so dar kayhaa so ghar kayhaa jit beh sarab samaalay.
content.text: Where is that Gate, and where is that Dwelling, in which You sit and take care of all?

content.original: ਜਤੁ ਪਾਹਾਰਾ ਧੀਰਜੁ ਸੁਨਿਆਰੁ ॥ ਅਹਰਣਿ ਮਤਿ ਵੇਦੁ ਹਥੀਆਰੁ ॥
content.transliteration: jat paahaaraa dheeraj suni-aar. ahran mat vayd hathee-aar.
content.text: Make continence your furnace, patience your goldsmith; make understanding your anvil, and divine knowledge your hammer.
